name: compiler
summary: Source code → machine code. Lexer → Parser → Semantic Analysis → Codegen → Optimizer.

facts.text: lexing → parsing → type check → IR → optimize → codegen
LLVM IR: portable intermediate representation — backend cho Rust, Swift, Clang
JIT: compile tại runtime — JavaScript V8, Java HotSpot
AOT: compile trước runtime — Go, Rust, C
